entry.title: Re: SSR Challenges in SAP Commerce Cloud
entry.content:
@JanWidmer 

OCC Caching (local at each node) : https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_COMMERCE_CLOUD_PUBLIC_CLOUD/3476714bba0b4cb9b3eb58c270e44439/8b711228866910149500b73575cb386e.html?locale=en-US

SSR Caching / server.ts : https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_COMMERCE_COMPOSABLE_STOREFRONT/eaef8c61b6d9477daf75bff9ac1b7eb4/c48860c28fbf443d906c682a2aed23b2.html?locale=en-US&version=6.8&q=ssr+caching#cache

 And you can also implement custom cache for some common parts.

entry.title: Re: Sales Document Approval Workflow
entry.content:
Hello Brinda,

your sales order has probably been send to a different approver. Have you checked the "Flexible Workflow Administration" app to see the status and assigned approver of your sales order workflow?

 

Best regards,

Marvin

entry.title: Re: 🟢 Clean Core Extensibility with ABAP Cloud in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition
entry.content: How to find the C1 released CDS entity for a given table?

entry.title: Re: Sales Document Approval Workflow
entry.content:
Hello Brinda,

your workflow has probably found a different approver. Have you checked the "Flexibel Workflow Administration" app to see the status and approver of the sales order workflow?

Best regards,

Marvin

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 Week 1 Contest Activities
entry.content:
Today's session (23 September) about the ABAP dictionary has a link to a blog that's about 3 years old. Is there a newer link?
Thanks

entry.title: how to add supervisor group in PTMW
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

is someone know how to add supervisor group in PTMW ?

Thanks for help.

entry.title: SAP Cloud Foundry - IP ranges of NAT gateways
entry.content:
In reference to question Solved: SAP Kyma - IP ranges of NAT gateways - is there a similar option to get the stable IP address for Cloud Foundry environments?

We have a similar situation, where a supplier with an SFTP server doesn't want to whitelist the whole bunch of AWS egress IPs of our Cloud Foundry region. 

Regions and API Endpoints Available for the Cloud Foundry Environment | SAP Help Portal

SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry runtime and environment

entry.title: Re: Invoice by ship-to
entry.content:
An email always goes to the email address of the contact person. You must therefore select the correct contact person that belongs to the delivery address.

You can do this with a formatted search in the contact person field in the invoice, which is always executed when the delivery address is changed.

In the business partner master data, you can assign a contact person to an address and then check this assignment in the query for the formatted search.

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 Week 1 Contest Activities
entry.content: @mwn - it links to a tutorial.  We want to have a variety of tutorials that match with the topics covered.  This one is older but also fundamental information that will help beginners.

entry.title: Re: WBS Element not appearing in Sales Order Line Item
entry.content: Excellent! I have find the exact reason why TAO item category not allowed WBS account entry in SO line.

entry.title: Re: Table for Charge Type of TM
entry.content: Got it, thank you~~

entry.title: Re: “I now have SAP S/4HANA Embedded Analytics. Do I still need a data warehouse?”
entry.content:
Hello @FreekKeijzer 

thanks for your response.

Unfortunately I have no real life experience ... since either eBW has been used only for Data preparation, or live reading to import this data into SAC ... or there are only a few Controlling department users, who consume the BI standard content in S4 with which also only S4 data is read.... but the Queries require the embedded BW.

Nevertheless I know several small companies, who ask for eBW as a successor of the stand-alone BW. They prefer to reduce their data volumes, to save additional license fees and utilize the eBW and Live SAC access over moving to SAP Datasphere... the monthly costs do not really compensate the benefits of their currently rather small reporting landscape ... e.g. only SD/MM reporting.

BR, Martin

entry.title: How to configure. SAP BTP Destination to generate Successfactors LMS OAuth token?
entry.content:
I am working on a small POC to make a simple OData API call through BTP application.  The call to the OData API works fine if i send the below mentioned details programmatically.

{

    "grant_type": "client_credentials",

    "scope": {

        "userId": "",

        "companyId": "",

        "userType": "",

        "resourceType": "learning_public_api"

    },

    "client_id": "",

    "client_secret": ""

}

But when i try to use the destination in the SAP BTP it fails.  

Can anyone help me in this issue.

thanks

Suchendra Kumar

entry.title: Re: Prevent Religion Key on Holiday Calendar from not gen...

entry.title: Re: Automatic Absence Generation – Part 1: Generate absence based on absence reason
entry.content:
Hello Experts!

For missed punch in/out after giving reason for absence, LOP should automatically generate after running PT60.

I have maintained entries in IT2011. I missed some dates for testing purposes to generate LOP. 

But, while I am going through the LOG, the TIP table is not showing 'A' under the "O" column.

Please guide me to generate LOP through Time Evaluation PT60.

Thanks in advance,
Sakthi.G

entry.content: Please share this code

entry.title: Re: RF Enviornment create / confirm adhoc Product not con...
entry.content:
Hi @castin ,

whether a warehouse resource is allowed to process a warehouse order or not is determined based on the Resource Management. Please try to set up the queue determination accordingly so the warehouse task that is created is assigned to a queue that the resource is allowed to work in based on the resource group.

Best regards,
Christian

entry.title: Re: Access Denied In "Terminal". Also cannot preview on my device it says error when I ent
entry.content: Hello, Thank you for reaching out to us. Based on the error screenshot, it appears that the user's account may not be configured with the proper role assignment. Could you please share the roles currently assigned to your user in BTP? This will assist us in conducting a more detailed investigation.

entry.title: how to use datediff in a story table column
entry.content:
Hi,

I need to show a column as number of months between start date and end date dimension in my story table. For that purpose I tried creating a calculated dimension where I wanted to use datediff but it gives me the below error.

 


I even added a property to the dimensions but it still shows error. 

Any solution for this?

PS: My story is model based

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: How to perform Master data cleansing activity
entry.content: The presentation about master data consolidation with SAP Master Data Governance on SAP S/4HANA may give you an initial context. See also the corresponding SAP Help Portal documentation.

entry.title: Re: Statement print in excecutive review. Only single pri...
entry.content:
Hello @xavierlegarrec

Greetings !

How to enable individual statement as pdf download link from executive review and from completed worksheets (three dots)  ?
You have shown the functionality in your video "statement mass download in SuccessFactors"

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ro8sF0aeWco


Best Regards
SAP SuccessFactors Compensation

entry.title: Re: double consumption
entry.content:
Hi 

Could you explain your scenario more precisely ?

entry.title: Re: The Sales and Distribution Bom of the sales order onl...
entry.content:
Hi,

The BoM usage specifies the context in which the BoM is intended to be used. For "Sales and Distribution," all components assigned within a single BoM are automatically deemed relevant to the sales process. Consequently, they appear in the sales order as items from a business perspective.

Therefore, I don't think it's currently feasible nor reasonable to achieve the goal of omitting a BoM item from the sales order while still having it appear in subsequent delivery notes. As such, if an item is listed in a delivery, it must also be listed in the preceding sales order to ensure compliance and data consistency.

However, I agree that it would be a valuable enhancement from a user experience standpoint for the system to allow end users to collapse sub-items in the sales order UI. Other more front-office-friendly softwares, like SAP CPQ, include such features. For S/4HANA Cloud, you are encouraged to submit your enhancement requests at S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Sales | Customer Influence using an S-user account.

Best Regards,
Fancy

entry.title: Re: Maximum quantity limit for line items in sales orders
entry.content: OK, Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Could not find a warehouse number for ERP whse number...

entry.title: Re: External Authentication for Microsoft Office 365 in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content: Hello, Thank you for reaching out to us. Ar you still encountering the issue, Could you please provide more detailed information to assist with further investigation?

entry.title: Re: Need to find BOM chang history CDS View for changes d...
entry.content:
Hello Gaurav Pawar,

 

BOM changes in S/4HANA Public Cloud are recorded via Change numbers or Change Records.

Please explore the available CDS Views from the Engineering Change Management area under the following link: CDS Views for Engineering Change Management | SAP Help Portal

These can be used to extract the data you require by developing a custom report for example.

Regarding the notifications to be sent; i recommend you to explore one of the developer extensibility options. Also maybe the developer can make use of enhancing the QM Notifications functionality to cover this requirement.

As an alternative option you can also think about creating a custom workflow via BRF+ to send out these notifications based on specific conditions and rules.

Kind regards,

Radu

entry.title: Re: 🟢 Clean Core Extensibility with ABAP Cloud in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition
entry.content: What to do if the CDS view required is not released?

entry.title: How to enable parallel processing on dwc concurrent calls to CAP service
entry.content:
Trying to make concurrent calls to CAP service using DWC and it is throwing "Caused by: java.lang.IllegalStateException: Could not determine dwc landscape base route"

 

StackTrace:

java.lang.IllegalStateException: java.lang.IllegalStateException: Could not determine dwc landscape base route,
at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeConstructorAccessorImpl.newInstance0(Native Method),
at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeConstructorAccessorImpl.newInstance(Unknown Source),
at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DelegatingConstructorAccessorImpl.newInstance(Unknown Source),
at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Constructor.newInstanceWithCaller(Unknown Source),
at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Constructor.newInstance(Unknown Source),
at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ForkJoinTask.getThrowableException(Unknown Source),
at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ForkJoinTask.reportException(Unknown Source),
at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ForkJoinTask.invoke(Unknown Source),
at java.base/java.util.stream.ReduceOps$ReduceOp.evaluateParallel(Unknown Source),
at java.base/java.util.stream.AbstractPipeline.evaluate(Unknown Source),
at java.base/java.util.stream.ReferencePipeline.collect(Unknown Source),

entry.title: Re: Edit Crystal Report Designer in SAP Business One Clie...
entry.content:
You need to install the Crystal Reports product and then the integration runtime to be able to interact from SAP.
Please note that the user who wants to edit and save layouts must have access credentials to SQL...

entry.title: Re: SAP MDG Changing worklist content failed mass processing
entry.content: Please refer to this note https://me.sap.com/notes/0003098273 Check all configuration and authorization issues.

entry.title: Re: SA 17.0.10.5866: Can't call my Web service, error “40...
entry.content:
I can't comment on the exact error message.

However, to understand and check web requests and responses, particularly for newly embedded web services, we usually have to turn on "Web client logging debugging" temporarily, as described here.

FWIW, the usage of this feature via "dbsrvX -zoc MyWebClientLog.txt" or

call sa_server_option('WebClientLogFile', 'MyWebClientLog.txt');
call sa_server_option('WebClientLogging', 'On');

has not changed for newer versions.

You can also log the web service's requests via the LOG network protocol option and its variants.

entry.title: Vendor notes and Attachments data migration from ECC to S4 target tables SRGBTEL and SOOD
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

I am looking for your suggestions on how to migrate the vendor notes and attachments information from ECC to S4 target tables SRGBTEL and SOOD. 

What should be the right load method to accomplish this? If anybody had good exposure on this, kindly throw some light on right load method (like IDOC/ FM/ LSMW).

 

#datamigration, #BODS , #DATA , #PTP, #VENDOR , #SUPPLIER , #SUPPLIER ATTACHMENTS, #VENDOR ATTACHMENTS

 

Thanks,

Ahalya

entry.title: Re: Enter tax code error ME 083 when creating a freight s...
entry.content:
Hello @takudzwa82 

The system can't determine a tax code during purchase order creation - see the notes

  • 2424664 - Master Data set-up for Tax Code in SAP TM and ERP
  • 2622403 - Tax Code Determination for Service Purchase order item and Service item and PDF attachment to the note

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: SAP MDG Changing worklist content failed mass processing
entry.content: Check Su53 and the fiori authorization checks. I assume all sicf nodes and corresponding web services and SLD etc is correct

I am trying to build a simple application having data-model.cds and catalog-service.cds files in BAS project , i have performed npm installation as well have made necessary changes in package.json file still i am getting error while deploying to cloud foundry.

I have enclosed all the snippets of of my development.

Kindly suggest and help in resolving this. 

Thanks & Regards,

Ayushi Shrivastava

entry.title: Re: Deployment failing for CAPM application when deploying to cloud foundry and HANA instance.
entry.content: As you can read in the logfile you have to check the logs of the Approuter. It crashed.

entry.title: Re: Material Master Nomenclature
entry.content: Add tag SAP S/4HANA Cloud Master Data.

entry.title: Re: Reduce the number fo messages for BP-Replication
entry.content: Additional information: If you defined filter criteria using the Manual Replication Filter Criteria button, the system selects the Manual Replication Filter Criteria Available checkbox. During replication, the system ignores the preexisting filters defined in transaction DRFF and applies the manual filter criteria.

entry.title: Re: Reduce the number fo messages for BP-Replication
entry.content: Additional information: If you defined filter criteria using the Manual Replication Filter Criteria button, the system selects the Manual Replication Filter Criteria Available checkbox. During replication, the system ignores the preexisting filters defined in transaction DRFF and applies the manual filter criteria.

entry.title: Error No Memory Available in Preparation for Consolidation Group Changes / PCC
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

I encounter an error when attempting to execute the Preparation for Consolidation Group Changes / PCC in HANA 2023.

Both the extended memory (EM) number 12.000.000.000 and the assigned memory (HEAP) number 12.000.000.000 have been allocated.

Error happen in include object FINCS_PCC_PCC2_F09 when collect data into variable gt_acdocu_pl . 

I have also implemented certain SAP notes regarding PCC, including the reduction of memory utilization; however, the error persists.

I would be really grateful for your advice and direction regarding this matter.

entry.title: Re: How to change draw signature dimensions and borders
entry.content:
Hello Maraja, Thank you for reaching out to us. Yes, there are certain limitations with the Draw Signature function. For more detailed information and assistance, please refer to the community blog linked below.

https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-builders-discussions/how-to-draw-signature-in-sap-build-apps/m-p/13650565#M1028

entry.title: Re: 🟢 Clean Core Extensibility with ABAP Cloud in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition
entry.content:
With this implementation approach, you save developers efforts using managed runtime during interaction phase.

If it is an unmanaged implementation, then the developer should spend efforts in implementing the methods 'CREATE' , 'UPDATE', 'DELETE' in handler class

entry.title: Re: How can I Access ADLC in Public Cloud
entry.content: We helped you to accept the answer, since there were no updates after 7 days. You can unaccept it anytime if you have further questions.

entry.title: Re: Deployment failing for CAPM application when deployin...
entry.content: You have to check if there is a start script in the package.json of your approuter.

entry.title: Re: Archived MDG Change Request isn't listed in "Display...
entry.content:
Hi

Have you tried to check this checkbox? 

I hope this helps.

entry.title: Re: SSR Challenges in SAP Commerce Cloud
entry.content:
Hi @joris_quenee, we have already added OCC caching on commerce API side.

Regarding SSR Caching, the docs (your second link) explicitely mention, that it's not recommended to use the "cache" option of the SSR Optimization:

How and where (Technology / Location) would a custom cache be implemented? Are you talking about caching often used OCC Request Responses on the frontend nodes to increase SSR Speed?

entry.title: Filter latest log time from log data
entry.content:
Hello,

I have list of users, log data and log time when something was change in there accounts. 
I want to filter data in my model that I will see only latest log time for every users in every days.
I'm thinking about adding a script in Datapshere - GREATEST, but I don't know how to use it. 

Could you help me? Or maybe you know some different way to filter data like I want?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: How to configure. SAP BTP Destination to generate Successfactors LMS OAuth token?
entry.content: If you expect help you should provide more details about your destination configuration.

entry.title: Re: Pixelated / Low Resolution Image in the Image Control
entry.content:
@bill_froelich 

This is what inside my page, unfortunately my image displayed in low resolution.

I also tried to set direct URL in the "Image" parameter but the result was the same.

 

{
    "Controls": [
        {
            "FilterFeedbackBar": {
                "ShowAllFilters": false,
                "_Type": "Control.Type.FilterFeedbackBar"
            },
            "_Type": "Control.Type.SectionedTable",
            "_Name": "SectionedTable0",
            "Sections": [
                {
                    "Separators": {
                        "TopSectionSeparator": false,
                        "BottomSectionSeparator": true,
                        "HeaderSeparator": true,
                        "FooterSeparator": true,
                        "ControlSeparator": true
                    },
                    "KeyAndValues": [
                        {
                            "Value": "{Matnr}",
                            "_Name": "KeyValue0",
                            "KeyName": "/App/Rules/Utility/FormatMaterialNumber.js",
                            "Visible": true
                        },
                        {
                            "Value": "{DescriptionMat}",
                            "_Name": "KeyValue1",
                            "KeyName": "$(L,'ProductDescr')",
                            "Visible": true
                        }
                    ],
                    "MaxItemCount": 1,
                    "_Type": "Section.Type.KeyValue",
                    "_Name": "SectionKeyValue0",
                    "Visible": true,
                    "EmptySection": {
                        "FooterVisible": false
                    },
                    "Layout": {
                        "NumberOfColumns": 2
                    }
                },
                {
                    "Separators": {
                        "TopSectionSeparator": false,
                        "BottomSectionSeparator": true,
                        "HeaderSeparator": true,
                        "FooterSeparator": true,
                        "ControlSeparator": true
                    },
                    "KeyAndValues": [
                        {
                            "Value": "{EAN}",
                            "_Name": "KeyValue2",
                            "KeyName": "$(L,'BarcodeEAN')",
                            "Visible": true
                        },
                        {
                            "Value": "{CustMaterial}",
                            "_Name": "KeyValue3",
                            "KeyName": "$(L,'CustomerProduct')",
                            "Visible": true
                        }
                    ],
                    "MaxItemCount": 1,
                    "_Type": "Section.Type.KeyValue",
                    "_Name": "SectionKeyValue1",
                    "Visible": true,
                    "EmptySection": {
                        "FooterVisible": false
                    },
                    "Layout": {
                        "NumberOfColumns": 2
                    }
                },
                {
                    "Separators": {
                        "TopSectionSeparator": false,
                        "BottomSectionSeparator": true,
                        "HeaderSeparator": true,
                        "FooterSeparator": true,
                        "ControlSeparator": true
                    },
                    "KeyAndValues": [
                        {
                            "Value": "{TypePos}",
                            "_Name": "KeyValue5",
                            "KeyName": "$(L,'ItemType')",
                            "Visible": true
                        },
                        {
                            "Value": "{Qty}",
                            "_Name": "KeyValue4",
                            "KeyName": "$(L,'Quantity')",
                            "Visible": true
                        }
                    ],
                    "MaxItemCount": 1,
                    "_Type": "Section.Type.KeyValue",
                    "_Name": "SectionKeyValue2",
                    "Visible": true,
                    "EmptySection": {
                        "FooterVisible": false
                    },
                    "Layout": {
                        "NumberOfColumns": 2
                    }
                },
                {
                    "Separators": {
                        "TopSectionSeparator": false,
                        "BottomSectionSeparator": true,
                        "HeaderSeparator": true,
                        "FooterSeparator": true,
                        "ControlSeparator": true
                    },
                    "KeyAndValues": [
                        {
                            "Value": "{UM}",
                            "_Name": "KeyValue6",
                            "KeyName": "$(L,'UnitOfMeasure')",
                            "Visible": true
                        },
                        {
                            "Value": "{Tester}",
                            "_Name": "KeyValue7",
                            "KeyName": "$(L,'TesterQuantity')",
                            "Visible": true
                        }
                    ],
                    "MaxItemCount": 1,
                    "_Type": "Section.Type.KeyValue",
                    "_Name": "SectionKeyValue3",
                    "Visible": true,
                    "EmptySection": {
                        "FooterVisible": false
                    },
                    "Layout": {
                        "NumberOfColumns": 2
                    }
                },
                {
                    "Separators": {
                        "TopSectionSeparator": false,
                        "BottomSectionSeparator": true,
                        "HeaderSeparator": true,
                        "FooterSeparator": true,
                        "ControlSeparator": true
                    },
                    "KeyAndValues": [
                        {
                            "Value": "$(D,{DataCons},,,{format:'short'})",
                            "_Name": "KeyValue8",
                            "KeyName": "$(L,'DeliveryDate')",
                            "Visible": true
                        },
                        {
                            "Value": "{Discount}",
                            "_Name": "KeyValue9",
                            "KeyName": "$(L,'DiscountCondition')",
                            "Visible": true
                        }
                    ],
                    "MaxItemCount": 1,
                    "_Type": "Section.Type.KeyValue",
                    "_Name": "SectionKeyValue4",
                    "Visible": true,
                    "EmptySection": {
                        "FooterVisible": false
                    },
                    "Layout": {
                        "NumberOfColumns": 2
                    }
                },
                {
                    "EmptySection": {
                        "FooterVisible": false
                    },
                    "Separators": {
                        "TopSectionSeparator": false,
                        "BottomSectionSeparator": true,
                        "HeaderSeparator": true,
                        "FooterSeparator": true,
                        "ControlSeparator": true
                    },
                    "_Type": "Section.Type.Image",
                    "_Name": "SectionImage0",
                    "Visible": true,
                    "Image": "{Url}",
                    "Alignment": "Center",
                    "ContentMode": "ScaleAspectFit"
                }
            ]
        }
    ],
    "_Type": "Page",
    "_Name": "ShowSalesOrderItem",
    "PrefersLargeCaption": true
}

Can you please share your page code ?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Bill against payment
entry.content:
Hello Esaiteja,

The link at the table level can be established via the clearing document information. The table ACDOCA will have the DZ/RV documents as well as the clearing document. But the table BSE_CLR will have the information to establish the payment (clearing document) and the cleared billing (RV) document. We need to also check if the payment document itself is the clearing document, or there is a separate document which has cleared payment against the bill.  

Thank you!

entry.title: How to enable parallel processing on dwc concurrent calls to CAP service
entry.content:
Trying to make concurrent calls to CAP service using DWC and it is throwing "Caused by: java.lang.IllegalStateException: Could not determine dwc landscape base route"

java.lang.IllegalStateException: java.lang.IllegalStateException: Could not determine dwc landscape base route,
at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeConstructorAccessorImpl.newInstance0(Native Method),
at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeConstructorAccessorImpl.newInstance(Unknown Source),
at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DelegatingConstructorAccessorImpl.newInstance(Unknown Source),
at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Constructor.newInstanceWithCaller(Unknown Source),
at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Constructor.newInstance(Unknown Source),
at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ForkJoinTask.getThrowableException(Unknown Source),
at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ForkJoinTask.reportException(Unknown Source),
at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ForkJoinTask.invoke(Unknown Source),
at java.base/java.util.stream.ReduceOps$ReduceOp.evaluateParallel(Unknown Source),
at java.base/java.util.stream.AbstractPipeline.evaluate(Unknown Source),
at java.base/java.util.stream.ReferencePipeline.collect(Unknown Source),

entry.title: Re: 🟢 It's Time for TypeScript (CAP edition)
entry.content: Nice Session , thanks for explaining, Any roadmap from sap that force customer should use type script rather using Java script. Or any plan which will lead customer to migrate existing one to typescripts.

entry.title: Core EHS to SAP EHS
entry.content: Hello everyone, I have been working as a Project EHS Officer in Dubai for the past five years. I'm considering studying the SAP EHS module. Do you think this is a good decision? What are your thoughts?

entry.title: Re: 🟢 Clean Core Extensibility with ABAP Cloud in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition
entry.content: Great session! Very well prepared demo's. Thank you! 😃

entry.title: Re: 🟢 It's Time for TypeScript (CAP edition)
entry.content: It was a good decision on TS. I understood using TS we can avoid runtime errors which may occur at execution level due to the wrong type mapping of data/variables. I'll implement TS for sure for further projects. Thank you so much 👏👏👏🙌🙌🙌

entry.title: Re: 🟢 It's Time for TypeScript (CAP edition)
entry.content: Great starter session to begin with the development using TypeScript Mike! I hope more detailed ones comes soon 😀

entry.title: Offboarding tasks stuck on loading
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

A client recently went live on Onboarding 2.0 module. But raised an issue that responsible users are unable to complete offboarding tasks. The tasks keep loading without showing and the onboarding/offboarding dashboards too show No Data. I have granted all necessary permissions but still did not work.

Kindly help with your advise.

SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding 

SAP SuccessFactors Platform

entry.title: Re: SAP Community Call for ALM – APJ edition
entry.content:
Hi,

There is no registration, there is an Add to Calendar option in this page using which you can create a calendar entry and join the session at the scheduled time.

entry.title: Re: 🟢 It's Time for TypeScript (CAP edition)
entry.content: That's great to hear! I'm sure that once you start using it you won't go back

entry.title: Re: 🟢 It's Time for TypeScript (CAP edition)
entry.content:
Hi @Harendra_singh167 ,

such Roadmap does not exist. The SAP Cloud Application Programming model provides you the option to go with Node.js or Java as natively supported languages. Because CAP is supporting Node.js which is a JavaScript flavor, we get TypeScript support as well. If you as a developer (Partner or Customer) want to use TypeScript instead of plain Node.js (JavaScript) because that is the expertise your development team has, or because it makes architectural sense, or any other reason, it is there available for you!

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content: • Hello David I have started my learning journey for sap Hana data engineer certification; there are ebooks that I should pay to complete the learning path but I can’t do it! I have used books from sap press and I am studying on them and in the free e-learning platform from sap learning. Can I mark the sections as completed using my books instead of buying them on the sap hub?

entry.title: Re: How to use XSUAA in FastAPI Python app
entry.content:
I did not find any straight forward solution to this, so I took a little turn around. Since we don't have `@sap/approuter` as a plugin for python/java applications yet. We will need to use Node for using the approuter.

Steps taken to achieve my goal:

1. Create a new node app for sap-approuter, check the below manifest.yaml 

- name: router
  routes:
    - route: fastapi-app.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com
  env:
    destinations: >
      [
       {
         "name":"fastapi-app",
          "url":"https://fastapi-srv.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com",
          "forwardAuthToken": true,
          "timeout": 600000
       }
      ]
  disk_quota: 256M
  timeout: 600
  memory: 256M
  path: web
  services:
    - a-xsuaa
    - a-logging-service

If you need more information on creating the node app, refer to this tutorial.

This destination will be used later to hit the FastAPI app through app-router app after authentication

2. Simple example xs-security.json for creating the xsuaa instance, where I will use our default IdP of the sub-account for authentication.

{
	"xsappname": "fastapi-app",
	"tenant-mode": "dedicated",
	"oauth2-configuration": {
		"redirect-uris": [
			"https://fastapi-app.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/**"
		]
	}
}

 3. The magic of redirect resides in the xs-app.json, where i will redirect all incoming requests after authentication to FastAPI App. Whenever the user hits app-router app url `fastapi-app.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com`, which in my case gives an impression of FastAPI app url, I will simply redirect them to FastAPI's route which in turns returns the landing page for the user.

{
  "routes": [
    {
      "source": "/(.*)",
      "target": "$1",
      "destination": "fastapi-app",
      "httpMethods": ["GET"],
      "csrfProtection": false
    }
  ],
  "errorPage": [
    {
      "status": [403],
      "file": "resources/forbidden.html"
    },
    {
      "status": [404],
      "file": "resources/404.html"
    }
  ]
}

Here the destination should match the destination's name environment variable that we created in manifest.yaml that's how it know which server to call with the generated oauth token after authentication.

4. Example of the FastAPI route to return the landing page after authorization check

router = APIRouter()
templates = Jinja2Templates(directory="com/crack/snap/make/templates")


@router.get("/", response_class=HTMLResponse)
async def read_root(request: Request, security_context: Optional[SecurityContextXSUAA] = Depends(require_auth)):
	return templates.TemplateResponse("index.html", {"request": request})

5. I have skipped the role creation and role check for simplicity

entry.title: SAP Customer Success Day for BTP - Madrid - 9th of October
entry.content:
REGISTER HERE 👉 events.sap.com

This Customer Success Day will focus on Business Technology Platform.

During this exclusive event, you will be among fellow SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) pioneers, enabling you to connect with peers and SAP experts to gain insights and maximize your SAP BTP knowledge. This is credit to an environment where customers can learn from one another and provide feedback on how to enhance the SAP offering.
 
During this event you will hear from SAP leaders and adoption experts - learn about the experiences of other customers through keynotes and panel discussions, participate in hands-on workshops, hear the latest updates on SAP BTP roadmap – all with a focus on helping you get the most value from SAP BTP solutions. 

This is an exclusive event with limited capacity.
Secure your seat today!

REGISTER HERE 👉 events.sap.com

entry.title: Re: 🟢 It's Time for TypeScript (CAP edition)
entry.content:
Thanks! The blog I mentioned has quite a lot more detail: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/why-the-typescript-sheriff-has-come-to-clean-up-your-javascript-part-1-of-3/ba-p/13550500

Today's session was focused on CAP, and in particular the TypeScript features which were added in CDS8

Online you will find lots of TypeScript resources, because it's very widely used outside of the SAP world

entry.title: Re: ABAP Calling last calling program in the stack
entry.content: @Sandra_Rossi I tried this change. However, Getting back from ALV to Selection is not a problem. From Selection screen of (ZSOUPLOAD) program to back to calling program is main issue. From selection screen (ZSOUPLOAD -1000 screen no) back to calling program (screen 400) is not working.

entry.title: Re: Quality Assurance Approval & Instant Forward for Transport Requests in S/4HANA Cloud Public
entry.content: Hi @danica09, "Set Quality Status" button will remain disabled until you select a particular TR to Approve/Reject via the said button. Once your TR is approved, you'll be able to forward it to the Prod tenant.

entry.title: Re: LCA -- Live cache not accessible
entry.content: how to start X_server

entry.title: Re: 🟢 It's Time for TypeScript (CAP edition)
entry.content:
Thanks! At the moment it's very much a matter of choice.  Not every developer wants to use TypeScript, although I reckon it pays back the little extra effort required pretty quickly.

Amongst SAP products the support varies.  The SAP Cloud SDK team are enthusiasts IMO.  Their generated clients are typescript by default.  The UI5 team have provided new tutorials and samples. The CAP team have added good new features quite recently.

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Petoberfest 2024
entry.content: CAP or CAT..

entry.title: Split Date of Production in Inbound Delivery
entry.content:
Hi, I have a requirement to Split Date of Production in Inbound Delivery for same batch:

For example:

I received goods 10 EA

3 for date of production 01/01/2024

4 for date of production 01/02/2024

3 for date of production 01/03/2024

Maybe when batch creation looks like this:

Is it possible via Standard? Or any other solution?

 

Thanks and Best Regards

Yunike Andriani

entry.title: Re: SA 17.0.10.5866: Can't call my Web service, error “40...
entry.content: fgfd

entry.title: Issue with actual data when we have data not published
entry.content:
Dear All,

We have an issue in an input schedule in SAC.

We have a column "Actuals" which is feeded by an import job from S/4 HANA. We have also an inputable column "Forecast" where users enter their forecasted amount.

Actuals data are imported every hours.

If we have data not published (user entered a forecasted amound and not published it), actuals data are not correctly displayed (it doesn't show the latest imported data).

Have you an idea of how to fix this issue ?

Thanks

Mat

entry.title: Re: i_journalentrytp - RAP Action
entry.content:
Hi,

Please check blog:

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/how-to-use-i-journalentrytp-in-custom-rap-bo/ba-p/13581164#comment-694240

Best regards,
Take

entry.title: Re: OData V4 / CDS - $count not implemented
entry.content:
Hello,

OData is not created from SEGW transaction, it is created through CDS annotations which automatically creates OData.

PS4 version is S/4 HANA 2021 FPS01 and we are upgrading to S/4 HANA 2023 FPS01.

/Facts/$count=true doesn't work.

/Facts works well.

Regards

entry.title: Re: SAP Solution Scout – the entry point for portfolio exploration
entry.content: Solution Scout is great. It is very usefule for Business Architects
